questions.q: Under a new agreement effective April 7, 2026, what percentage of Amazon's existing package volume will the U.S. Postal Service (USPS) continue to handle?
questions.correctText: The U.S. Postal Service will continue to handle approximately 80% of Amazon's existing package volume under their new deal.

questions.q: As of April 3, 2026, how much did United Airlines increase its first checked bag fee by for flights within the U.S., Mexico, Canada, and Latin America?
questions.correctText: United Airlines increased its first checked bag fee by $10, making it $45 for flights within the U.S., Mexico, Canada, and Latin America.

questions.q: Paramount Skydance has reportedly secured significant funding from Gulf investors for its proposed acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery. Approximately how much funding was secured?
questions.correctText: Paramount Skydance has reportedly secured nearly $24 billion in backing from Gulf investors for its proposed acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery.

questions.q: The Writers Guild of America (WGA) and the Alliance of Motion Picture and Television Producers (AMPTP) recently reached a tentative deal for a new Minimum Basic Agreement. What is the duration of this new agreement?
questions.correctText: The WGA and AMPTP reached a tentative four-year deal for a new Minimum Basic Agreement.

questions.q: Which life science-focused specialty finance company did Runway Growth Finance Corp. recently acquire for $249.0 million, expanding its healthcare and life sciences exposure?
questions.correctText: Runway Growth Finance Corp. closed its acquisition of SWK Holdings Corporation for $249.0 million.
